Registry / Terms / testing laboratory

testing laboratory

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00132 · 4 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 3 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102008OIML D 30:2008
#02163
3
- G.3-1 any necessary specialized laboratory or laboratories designated by the Issuing Authority to carry out examination and testing of a sample or samples of a measuring instrument submitted for evaluation, with the Issuing Authority assuming responsibility for the evaluation report
pending
20102004OIML B 10-1:2004
#00104
3.13
principal laboratory including any necessary specialized laboratory or laboratories designated by the Issuing Authority to carry out examination and testing of a sample or samples of a measuring instrument submitted for type evaluation, with the principal laboratory assuming responsibility for the evaluation results reported
pending
20101988OIML D 19:1988
#00132
1.1.8
a laboratory which measures, examines, tests, calibrates or otherwise determines the characteristics or performance of materials or products
pending

#00132
1.1
a laboratory which measures, examines, tests, calibrates or otherwise determines the characteristics or performance of materials or products
